cause: The MC Poisson bootstrap multiplies w_truth, so the stored truth histogram fluctuates across toys.
verdict: Do not quote the attempted 68.80% split-sample result. The all-toy truth mean is not independent of the scored ensemble. Supply an independent unfluctuated truth ROOT histogram or redesign the toy ensemble before computing 2D containment.
legacy_result: The same-ensemble 68.71% and mean-absolute-pull 0.794 values remain Gaussianity diagnostics, not coverage.
